title: Dummie the Mummy and the Sphinx of Shakaba
original_title: Dummie de Mummie en de Sfinx van Shakaba
overview: Dummie realizes that he is not as famous as his father, an ancient pharaoh, so he decides to rely more on himself and enters a special contest with the help of his best friend.
